data.content: Shipment review REJECTED: Implementation commit 598b787ed33e (Rotate take-loop agent pools across failures) is NOT on main. It exists only on branch beat/foolery-20ee. The prior shipment step incorrectly claimed success by referencing commit 32fd3e5f (Merge scope refinement worker), which is an unrelated pre-existing commit. The implementation must be merged to main and pushed to origin before shipment can be verified.
